title: X Crumbly French Crumble
description: A delicious dessert combining x crumbly pastry with a rich french cream filling.
instructions: Roll out the x crumbly pastry and place in a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the french cream and clotted cream.
Add sugar and vanilla extract (if using) to the cream mixture and mix until combined.
Pour the cream mixture into the pastry-lined baking dish.
Roll out the remaining pastry and crumble it over the top of the cream mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
